text:
User management
Host applications own sessions, redirects, CSRF validation, and persistence.

This reusable page delegates authentication and passkey behavior to host callbacks.

demo-user

Passkey UI composition
This account page receives passkey HTML through render_passkey_panel, while my-auth owns the reusable passkey forms and JSON endpoints.
